metadata.title: vocalmapp
metadata.description: A private workspace for mapping lyrics, vocal markers, and reference audio.

auth.title: Create an account or log in
auth.subtitle: Join your private vocal workspace.
auth.continueNote: By continuing, you agree to sign in securely.
auth.googleSignInError: Google sign-in could not start. Try again in a moment.
auth.codeSentBody: We sent a sign-in code to {email}. Keep this tab open and enter the newest code below.
auth.codeHelp: Enter the newest code sent to {email}. Requesting another code cancels the previous one.
auth.invalidCode: Enter the numeric code from your email.
auth.codeSendError: We could not send the sign-in code. Try again in a moment.
auth.codeRateLimitError: Supabase has temporarily rate-limited email codes for this address. Wait a few minutes, then request a new code.
auth.codeUnauthorizedEmailError: Supabase is refusing email sign-up or sign-in for this address. Check that email signups are enabled in Supabase Auth.
auth.codeSmtpError: Supabase could not hand this email to the SMTP provider. Check the Supabase Auth SMTP settings and the Resend delivery logs.
auth.codeVerifyError: The code is incorrect or has expired. Request a new code and try again.
auth.callbackBody: Keep this tab open while we finish Google sign-in.
auth.callbackError: Google sign-in could not be completed. Start again from the login screen.
auth.callbackMissingCode: Google returned without a Supabase sign-in code. Check that the local callback URL is allowed in Supabase and that Google uses the Supabase OAuth callback URL.
auth.callbackExchangeError: Supabase could not finish the code exchange. Start again from the login screen.
auth.productionNote: Supabase Auth must use email templates with the one-time token. For repeated testing or production, configure custom SMTP to avoid the default sender limits.

app.workspaceHint: Tap a word or line to add a cue.
app.settingsSubtitle: Manage your markers and reading view.
app.musicSearchHelp: Search YouTube, compare versions, and choose the video you want to practise with.
app.songFlowSearchBody: Search YouTube and select the exact version you want to practise with.
app.songFlowManualFallback: Choose a video before creating the vocal map.
app.songFlowDetailsBody: Review the song details, then paste or edit lyrics whenever you are ready.
app.songFlowAudioBody: The song is played through the official YouTube player. You can also add a private practice file.
app.youtubeSelectionRequired: Select a YouTube video to create this vocal map.
app.youtubeNoResults: No YouTube videos were found. Try adding the artist name.
app.youtubeQueryTooLong: Search queries can contain up to 120 characters.
app.youtubeMissingApiKey: YouTube search is not configured. Add YOUTUBE_API_KEY to the server environment.
app.youtubeInvalidApiKey: The YouTube API key is invalid or does not have access to YouTube Data API v3.
app.youtubeQuotaExceeded: The YouTube search quota has been reached. Try again later.
app.youtubeRateLimited: Too many searches. Wait a minute and try again.
app.youtubeUnavailable: YouTube search is temporarily unavailable. Try again later.
app.youtubeInvalidVideo: This YouTube video is invalid. Choose another version.
app.youtubeVideoUnavailable: This YouTube video is no longer available. Choose another version to keep your vocal map.
app.youtubeEmbeddingRestricted: This YouTube video cannot be embedded. Choose another version.
app.youtubePlayerIdentityMissing: YouTube could not verify this site. Disable any privacy extension that removes referrer data, then reload the page.
app.youtubePlayerLoadFailed: The YouTube player could not load. Check your connection and try again.
app.queryRequired: Enter a song title or artist.
app.lyricsFound: Lyrics found. Review them before saving.
app.syncedLyricsFound: Synced lyrics were found. Timestamps were removed for markup.
app.lyricsNotFound: Lyrics were not found. Paste lyrics manually.
app.lyricsFetchFailed: Lyrics could not be loaded. Paste lyrics manually.
app.markerPanelHint: Choose a marker to edit or hide it.
app.confirmDeleteMarker: Delete "{label}" and remove it from songs?
app.confirmHideSystemMarker: Hide default marker "{label}" from your marker list?
app.songTextSettingsHint: Adjust the lyric text size and spacing in the song view.
app.lyricsPlaceholder: Paste lyrics. Each line and each word becomes clickable.
app.songSavedAudioFailed: Song saved, but the audio file could not be uploaded.
app.confirmDeleteSong: Delete "{title}" with its markers and audio?
app.audioUploadDialogBody: Choose a file, then name the version you want to practise with.
app.audioNameRequired: Add a name for this audio file.
app.youtubeAudioNotice: Audio is played through the official YouTube player. Vocalmapp does not host or download copyrighted audio.
app.syncSaveFailed: The text timestamp could not be saved. Try again.
app.notePlaceholder: Write a note for this text...
app.emptyDocument: Add lyrics to start marking up this song.
app.emptyWorkspaceBody: Find a song, paste lyrics, then add colored vocal markers and reference audio to lines or words.
app.unsupportedRecording: This browser does not support audio recording.
app.audioMissing: Audio file was not found in Supabase Storage.
app.noteSaveFailed: Note could not be saved. Try again.
app.saveFailed: Changes could not be saved. Try again.
app.markersCount: {count, plural, one {# marked place} other {# marked places}}
app.profileSubtitle: Choose a nickname and add a short vocal focus.
app.profileNameRequired: Add a nickname with at least 2 characters.
app.profileSaveFailed: Profile could not be saved. Try again.

mute.label: Mute
mute.meaning: Sing quieter or remove extra sound

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.body: The page you requested does not exist.

error.title: Something went wrong
error.body: Refresh the page or return to the dashboard.
